attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ASN_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.PALLET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.DIMENSION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_QTY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_WEIGHT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_WEIGHT_UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_LENGTH, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_WIDTH, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_HEIGHT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_VOLUME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_DIM_UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_VOL_UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.LAST_UPDATE_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.CARTON_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.PACKOUT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET,
 (
 select ASN_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET
 minus
 select ASN_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ASN_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.ASN_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PALLET.REFRESH_DATETIME
